display_information.name: MLA Heir
display_information.description: Heir — MLA's Business Developer, Stefan's strategic peer. Weekly strategic reviews, finance pulse, opportunity scans, and revenue recommendations.
display_information.long_description: Heir is a strategic peer to MLA's founder Stefan Stešević, hungry for growth and revenue. It monitors the €200k deficit recovery across three workstreams (grants, BI-as-a-service commercialization, revenue diversification), delivers weekly strategic reviews on Mondays, finance pulse on Fridays, and daily opportunity scans. Heir advises other MLA agents on quality and proposes revenue-generating actions directly to Stefan.
